evals.prompt: Set up a Turborepo monorepo configuration for a project with a Next.js frontend (apps/web) and an Express backend (apps/api), sharing a UI library (packages/ui).
evals.expected_output: Turborepo configuration (turbo.json) and basic workspace setup.
expectations: Provides a valid turbo.json configuration file
Explains how to set up the package.json workspaces array (npm/yarn/pnpm)

evals.prompt: How do I configure Nx to cache my Jest test results across the monorepo?
evals.expected_output: Nx configuration snippet for caching test results.
expectations: Sets 'cache: true' or includes 'test' in cacheableOperations
Mentions configuring inputs (e.g., source files) to invalidate the cache correctly
